task: Fix three documented gaps in Agent 25 (competitive_intel_agent.py)

gap_fixes.title: Parallel G2 + Google Discovery

implementation.approach: ThreadPoolExecutor with max_workers=2 for parallel execution
implementation.path_a: Primary source (G2/Capterra/Google based on industry inference)
implementation.merge_strategy: Deduplicate + rank by relevance (URLs in both paths first)
implementation.generic_filter: Removes google.com, linkedin.com, facebook.com, twitter.com, wikipedia.org, youtube.com
